questions.question: How many from the tribes of Israel were sealed?
questions.feedback: 144,000 from all the tribes of Israel were sealed.

questions.question: The great multitude that no one could count was wearing what?
questions.feedback: A great multitude stood before the throne wearing white robes.

questions.question: The great multitude came out of the great tribulation.
questions.feedback: These are they who have come out of the great tribulation.

questions.question: God will wipe away every _____ from their eyes.
questions.feedback: God will wipe away every tear from their eyes.

questions.question: They have washed their robes and made them white in the _____ of the Lamb.
questions.feedback: They washed their robes white in the blood of the Lamb.
